examples: I saw him do his one-man show in Austin, which I loved.
Austin displayed conduct unbecoming of an officer and a gentleman.
She said to a girl almost at Tom's elbow--with sham vivacity, "Why, Mary Austin!"
Austin, essentially, reaps the benefits of being a deep blue, Democratic island in a red-state sea.
Austin commemorates the peak viewing season with Bat Fest, now in its seventh year.
